title: gomphrena meyeniana var. caulescens
intro: Gomphrena meyeniana var. caulescens, also known as Caulescent Globe Amaranth, is a perennial plant belonging to the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Latin America, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gomphrena meyeniana var. caulescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, and it can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a salve or poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
